videos.headline: Daniel Wingate snags pick-six for Maryland's first TD of season
videos.description: Maryland's first touchdown of the season comes on the defensive side of the ball after Daniel Wingate's pick-six.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Daniel Wingate snags pick-six for Maryland's first TD of season) 2025/08/30 ESHEET
